rulings.Case Title: BETTY ANN MORRIS VS. GARY ROSSI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Stay Of Execution Pending Appeal Pursuant To Order; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Pos
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October. 23, 2012. Line 1 - DEFENDANT GARY ROSSI and FRANCIS MCDONALD Motion For Stay Of Execution Pending Appeal Pursuant To Order. Hearing required =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARGARET NARRON AS TRUSTEE OF THE NARRON FAMILY VS. CACEY GRAY AKA NIC GRAY et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October. 23, 2012. Line 2 - DEFENDANT ROBERT GARRETT and NICK GRAY's MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Deny moot 2nd amended complaint was quashed per 9/26/12 order. Additionally no proof of service re notice of entry of order. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EDWIN CHU VS. REYES GORMIAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October. 23, 2012. Line 3 - DEFENDANT FAVIANA TELLO's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Deny failed to sustain burden - 1. Can't file prejudgment claim of right to possession because judgment entered. 2. Not named in judgment therefore no standing. 3. Failed to provide court with proposed pleading. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. CHARITA REPOLLO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October. 23, 2012. Line 4 - DEFENDANT CHARITA REPOLLO's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Grant vacating judgment. Moving party to remit attorney fees and costs in the amount of $450.00. Trial set for November 5, 2012. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EDWARD A. ROBLES VS. ROBERT EMMANUEL MICALLEF et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October. 23, 2012. Line 5 - DEFENDANT ROBERT MICALLEF's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE and VACATE JUDGMENT. Deny failed to meet CCP 473 b standard. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LINDA GILSON VS. LOMBARD COLLISION WORKS, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October. 23, 2012. Line 6 - DEFENDANT CARLOS TORRES' HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION. Hearing required. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 3045 MISSION STREET LLC VS. SAIED AMIN et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October. 23, 2012. Line 7 - DEFENDANT SAIED AMIN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overrule, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficient per ccp 430.10(f) = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GAYLORD ASSOCIATES LP VS. NATHAN CRUISE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October. 23, 2012. Line 8 - DEFENDANT NATHAN CRUISE's Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment. Deny failed to sustain burden per ccp 473(b) admits proper service. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: US BANK TRUST N.A. AS TRUSTEE FOR VOLT 2012-NPL1 VS. JEMAL GETU et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October. 23, 2012. Line 9 - PLAINTIFF US BANK TRUST N.A. AS TRUSTEE FOR VOLT 2012-NPL1's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Grant subject to opposition. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NASIR PATEL VS. DAVID C. FROULA
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October. 23, 2012. Line 10 - DEFENDANT DAVID FROULA's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Grant subject to opposition. =(501/REQ)
